title: phat-controller state file
description: Per-repo state for the autometta pass-2 autonomous loop. Stored at state/state.yaml in the repo it describes. Written only by scripts/tick.sh; humans should treat it as read-only.

version.description: Schema major version. Bumped when state.yaml shape changes incompatibly.

current_stage.description: Stage id currently in_progress, or null if no stage is active. Must match an entry in stages[].id when non-null.

stages.description: Per-stage records, append-only by tick.sh. Order is dispatch order.

id.description: Stage id; convention is NN[a-z*]-kebab-slug matching the card filename in examples/self-host/ or wherever cards live for this repo. Optional lowercase letters between the NN prefix and the first dash allow sub-stages like 05a, 05b, 05c.

status.description: Stage lifecycle status. Transitions: pending -> in_progress -> completed | failed | stalled | verifier_failed. failed, stalled, and verifier_failed are terminal until a human re-briefs. verifier_failed means the verifier artefact reported overall=FAIL (or was malformed and treated as FAIL); the worker's working-tree changes have NOT been committed, and the operator decides whether to amend the stage card and re-run or revert.

worker.description: Worker identity string at dispatch time, post-resolution by the agent-orchestrator skill. Format: 'Family Model X.Y <slug@local>'.

verifier.description: Verifier identity string at dispatch time. Same format as worker.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of worker dispatch. Null while pending.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of stage completion (or failure / stall finalisation). Null while pending or in_progress.

commit.description: Git commit SHA of the stage's atomic commit. Null until step 7 of the dispatch contract executes.

worker_pid.description: OS pid of the dispatched worker process, if applicable. Null for sub-agent dispatches that run in-harness.

verifier_pid.description: OS pid of the dispatched verifier process, if applicable.

verifier_artefact.description: Relative path to state/verifiers/<stage-id>.json once the verifier has written it. Null before.

verifier_attempts.description: Count of verifier dispatches that have completed without producing an artefact. Tick.sh increments before each dispatch; stage moves to stalled when this hits the cap (currently 3).

stall_marker.description: Free-text marker written by tick.sh when stalling a stage; carries the stall reason and pid.

last_tick_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent tick that touched this file.

tick_count.description: Total number of ticks the controller has run against this repo since state.yaml was first written. Monotonic, never resets.

clock_tick_budget_remaining.description: Remaining ticks before the controller halts on this repo. Decremented each tick that does work; budget.json holds the cap. Convenience cache; budget.json is authoritative.

halted.description: True if the controller has halted this repo (budget exhaustion, consecutive failure cap, or operator marker). When true, the tick exits without dispatching.

halt_reason.description: Free-text reason set when halted becomes true.
